instruction: I would like to pad all the numbers in the 'Old ID' column with zeros in front, to fill them up to seven digits in the 'New 7 Digit ID' column.

steps.suggested_step: Type the formula: =TEXT(C2;"0000000") and press Enter.
Click cell D2 to select it.
Drag the fill handle (small square at bottom-right corner of cell D2) down to cell D21 to fill the formula for all rows.
Right-click the selection, choose Format Cells.
In the Format Cells window, ensure Category is set to Text, click OK.
